name: Microsoft 365 (Office)
description: Full Office suite including Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and OneDrive. Install on up to 5 devices.

name: News Access (NYT, WSJ, More)
description: Free digital access to major news platforms including New York Times, Wall Street Journal, Boston Globe, and Valley News.
notes: Jump the Paywalls section lists all available news sources

name: DOC Cabin Rentals
description: Rent DOC cabins throughout New Hampshire including the Second College Grant and hills near Hanover.

name: Dick's House Medical Services
description: Primary care, urgent care, and specialist appointments at Dartmouth's health center with on-site, Zoom, and phone visit options.

name: Hopkins Center Performances
description: World-class performances at the Hopkins Center including theater, dance, music, and film across multiple disciplines.
notes: Many shows free or discounted with student ID

name: Hood Museum of Art
description: Access to the Hood Museum with rotating exhibitions and permanent collections.
notes: Page doesn't explicitly state admission is free - verify admission policy

name: Dartmouth Athletic Events
description: Varsity sports events including hockey, football, basketball, rowing, and more.
notes: Most events free with student ID

name: Rauner Special Collections
description: Access to over 100,000 rare books, millions of manuscripts, and the Dartmouth College Archives.

name: Alumni Services
description: Access to library resources, alumni directory, career resources, and lifelong learning opportunities.
notes: Includes digital library access and selected journals, magazines, newspapers, and databases
